field_inventory.description: Self-describing inventory of mutable state.json fields with expected refresh cadence. During metric verification (step 5.11), any field not refreshed within its cadence should be flagged and corrected. This inverts the verification pattern from 'enumerate what to check' to 'flag what hasn't been checked.' Per audit #80. Semantics: last_refreshed = cycle when entry was last checked (value confirmed unchanged or updated). This differs from per-field last_verified which means 'cycle when value was independently measured.' A field can be refreshed (checked and confirmed unchanged) without being re-verified (re-measured).

audit_dropped.cadence: after dropping a previously accepted audit recommendation

eva_input_issues.closed_this_cycle.cadence: every cycle (reset even when no closures)

last_eva_comment_check.cadence: every cycle (checked even when no comments found)

qc_requests_pending.cadence: after QC request creation or completion

review_agent.cadence: every cycle (updated when consuming review findings)

review_agent.chronic_category_responses.cadence: when chronic categories are detected (5+ in last 6 reviews)

schema_status.google_rich_results_types.cadence: after Google gallery changes or new implementations

schema_status.phpstan_max_assessment.cadence: after PHPStan config or fix changes

test_count.cadence: every merge that adds/removes PHP or TS tests (scope: PHP+TS only, excludes Rust tool tests)

total_testable_types.cadence: after schema class or enum additions

typescript_stats.cadence: every merge that adds/removes TS files

chronic_category_responses.description: Traceable artifacts for chronic category escalation (step 0.5.8). When a finding category appears in 5+ of the last 6 reviews, it must have a response entry here documenting root cause, chosen path, and verification. Per cycle 159/160 review recommendation.

entries.rationale: journal-quality findings in cycles 155-160 were positive/confirmatory (5/5 positive). Recurrence reflects consistent verification of a healthy practice, not a chronic problem. No structural fix needed — the review agent should continue checking journal quality but the category is expected to appear regularly.
entries.root_cause: Review agent consistently evaluates journal quality each cycle. Findings are overwhelmingly positive (confirming reflective, causally-linked entries). The category recurs because journal evaluation is a standing review criterion, not because of a persistent deficiency.

entries.rationale: process-adherence findings in cycles 195-200 consistently flagged missing per-step comments on cycle issues. The structural fix is the post-step tool (merged cycle 200, PR #846) plus the existing STARTUP_CHECKLIST mandate. Cycle 201 is the first cycle using post-step for every step. If the category persists after tool adoption, recalibrate.
entries.root_cause: Orchestrator posted batched summary comments instead of individual per-step comments. The post-step tool did not exist until cycle 200, and was not used in its merge cycle due to the adoption gap pattern (audit #160).

entries.rationale: receipt-integrity findings in cycles 197-203 consistently flagged nonexistent SHA hashes and stale metrics in hand-assembled worklog receipt tables. The structural fix has two layers: (1) cycle-receipts tool (merged cycle 200) generates receipts mechanically from git log, and (2) cycle-close enhancement (#884, dispatched cycle 204) will embed receipt tables in closing comments automatically. The root cause is manual assembly — the fix is automation.
entries.root_cause: Orchestrator hand-assembled receipt tables by copying SHAs from tool output, sometimes recording wrong or stale hashes. The cycle-receipts tool exists but was not consistently used to generate the worklog receipt table.

entries.rationale: worklog-accuracy findings in cycles 204-208 consistently flagged placeholder text (Not provided., None.) in worklog status sections that contradict committed state.json data. Dispatched #917 to enhance write-entry to auto-populate status sections from state.json and fail-closed on placeholder text. Per audit #171.
entries.root_cause: write-entry defaults to 'Not provided.' for --copilot-metrics, --publish-gate when CLI flags are not passed, instead of reading from state.json. The orchestrator does not always pass these flags.

Findings: worklog-accuracy (bare #N auto-links to wrong issue), review-accounting (dispatched counted as actioned), journal-quality (write-entry bug still producing contradictory output), field-inventory (every-cycle fields stale, tooling grace too permissive). Actioned 2 (review-accounting standard tightened, field-inventory entries refreshed). Deferred 2 (worklog-accuracy needs write-entry fix, journal-quality needs write-entry bug fix).

Findings: worklog-accuracy (stale current-state numbers and nonexistent receipt SHA), state-integrity (field-inventory fix claimed but markers stale), tooling-contract (cycle-close untested edge cases), complacency-audit (audit #162 drop was convenience-driven). Actioned 2: state-integrity (field inventory freshness corrected cycle 206), complacency-audit (audit #166 accepted, audit_dropped tracking added). Deferred 2: worklog-accuracy (mechanical receipt generation via cycle-close addresses this), tooling-contract (needs dispatch for edge case tests).

Findings: worklog-accuracy (placeholder data in worklog contradicts state.json), state-integrity (chronic-category marked refreshed while deferred — false freshness signal), code-quality (PR #890 partial override bug in write-entry). Actioned 1: state-integrity (performed chronic-category check cycle 207, no chronic categories found). Deferred 2: worklog-accuracy (same root cause as prior — needs mechanical generation), code-quality (write-entry partial override — dispatch to Copilot).

worklog-accuracy: deferred (dispatching structural fix per audit #171). review-accounting: actioned (will include notes). process-adherence: deferred (process-merge needs tool fix). state-integrity: actioned (no false freshness advance).

Finding 1 (worklog-placeholders) actioned via PR #918 structural fix. Finding 3 (premature-verification) actioned via verification_cycle null fix. Finding 2 (artifact-verifier-drift) deferred. Finding 4 (field-inventory-cadence) deferred.
Finding 3 actioned (PR #923 merged). Findings 1,2,4 deferred.
